name: 18"x18" Modern Woven Checkerboard Square Decorative Pillow Black - Threshold™: Cotton Fabric, Indoor Paisley & Floral Design
description:
Add a playful look to your seating spot or bedscape with this Modern Woven Checkerboard Square Decorative Pillow Black from Threshold™. This woven throw pillow is adorned with a classic black-and-white checkerboard pattern for a tastefully textured aesthetic. It is made of 100% cotton shell with comfy polyester filling to provide plenty of cushioned comfort while you sit and relax. Toss it on your favorite armchair or arrange it with other colorful throw pillows on the couch to create an inviting look in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
